items.name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo N40638 Pink] For the Damierlicious special edition, the Victorine wallet is crafted in Damier canvas with a sweet and soft color palette. It brings a fresh and gentle touch to this compact wallet. The envelope-style flap is adorned with a gold-engraved button. Inside, there are pockets for bills and coins, as well as six card slots. size:12x9.5x1.5cm

items.name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo M82957 White Flower] This Zippy coin purse is made of Monogram jacquard denim, accented with contrasting calfskin trim. It reinterprets the classic Monogram DLD pattern using jacquard weaving and achieves a stonewashed denim effect. Designed compact yet spacious, it features two large compartments and multiple pockets and credit card slots when unzipped. Size: 11*8.5*2cm

items.name_cn:
Top-tier Replica Exclusive Photo [Capucines Wallet] M82764 82835 White (Floral)
A stylish and practical "Portefeuille Capucines Compact". A small wallet made of full-grain soft triangular leather, featuring 8 card slots, a zip coin purse, a bill pocket, and 2 flat pockets. The LV letter button closure that protects the contents inside is also charming.
Size: 13.5 x 9.5 x 3 cm
